name: Zucchini Apple Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups egg beaters (99% fat-free, substitute for thawed eggs)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Set aside.
2. In another large bowl, whisk together the egg beaters (or thawed eggs), white sugar, brown sugar, vegetable oil, and vanilla extract until well blended.
3. With your hands, gently stir in the shredded zucchini, shredded apple, and chopped nuts into the wet mixture.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until moistened.
5. Divide the batter evenly among three greased and floured 8 1/4 x 4 1/2 x 3-inch loaf pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 50-55 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow cooling in the pans for 10 minutes, then remove to wire racks to cool completely.
8. Wrap and store overnight. This recipe yields three loaves (18 servings each).
